kui-status-color-400s.$description: Color for a group of response status codes in the 400-499 range.

kui-status-color-500s.$description: Color for a group of response status codes in the 500-599 range.

kui-status-color-background-100.$description: Background color for http status 100 elements.

kui-status-color-background-200.$description: Background color for http status 200 elements.

kui-status-color-background-300.$description: Background color for http status 300 elements.

kui-status-color-background-400.$description: Background color for http status 400 elements.

kui-status-color-background-500.$description: Background color for http status 500 elements.

kui-status-color-text-100.$description: Text color for http status 100 elements.

kui-status-color-text-200.$description: Text color for http status 200 elements.

kui-status-color-text-300.$description: Text color for http status 300 elements.

kui-status-color-text-400.$description: Text color for http status 400 elements.

kui-status-color-text-500.$description: Text color for http status 500 elements.

kui-stepper-border-width.$description: Stepper step indicator (circle) border width, applied to incomplete (default) steps.

kui-stepper-color-background.$description: Stepper step indicator (circle) background color for incomplete (default) and pending steps.

kui-stepper-color-background-completed.$description: Stepper step indicator (circle) background color for completed steps.

kui-stepper-color-background-error.$description: Stepper step indicator (circle) background color for steps in an error state.

kui-stepper-color-background-selected.$description: Stepper step indicator (circle) background color for the current/active step.

kui-stepper-color-border.$description: Stepper step indicator (circle) border color for incomplete (default) steps.

kui-stepper-color-text.$description: Stepper step number text color inside the step indicator (circle) for incomplete (default) and pending steps.

kui-stepper-color-text-label-selected.$description: Stepper step label text color for the current/active and completed steps.

kui-stepper-color-text-selected.$description: Stepper step number text color inside the step indicator (circle) for the current/active step.

kui-stepper-connector-color-background.$description: Stepper connector line color between steps.

kui-stepper-connector-color-background-c.$description: Stepper connector line color following a completed step.

kui-stepper-font-weight.$description: Stepper step number and label font weight.

kui-table-cell-shadow-resize-hover.$description: Table body cell resize-handle hover indicator shadow.

kui-table-header-color-text-active-sort.$description: Table header text color when the column is the active sort column.

kui-table-header-shadow-resize-hover.$description: Table header resize-handle hover indicator shadow.

kui-table-header-shadow-scrolled.$description: Table header shadow when the table body is scrolled.

kui-table-row-color-background-expanded.$description: Table expanded (expandable content) row background color.

kui-table-row-color-background-hover.$description: Table row background color on hover.

kui-table-sticky-color-background.$description: Table sticky column (and actions column) cell background color.

kui-tabs-border-radius.$description: Tabs tab link border radius (default appearance).

kui-tabs-border-radius-minimal.$description: Tabs tab link border radius (minimal appearance).

kui-tabs-border-width.$description: Tabs container bottom border width (default appearance).

kui-tabs-border-width-selected.$description: Tabs current (selected) tab bottom border width — the active-tab underline (default appearance).

kui-tabs-color-background-hover.$description: Tabs tab link background color on hover (default appearance).

kui-tabs-color-border.$description: Tabs container bottom border color (default appearance).

kui-tabs-color-border-selected.$description: Tabs current (selected) tab bottom border color — the active-tab underline (default appearance).

kui-tabs-color-text-disabled.$description: Tabs tab link text color when disabled.

kui-tabs-color-text-hover.$description: Tabs tab link text color on focus (default appearance).

kui-tabs-color-text-minimal-hover.$description: Tabs tab link text color on hover (minimal appearance).

kui-tabs-color-text-selected.$description: Tabs current (selected) tab link text color.

kui-tabs-font-size.$description: Tabs tab link font size (default appearance).

kui-tabs-font-size-minimal.$description: Tabs tab link font size (minimal appearance).

kui-tabs-font-weight.$description: Tabs tab link font weight (default appearance).

kui-tabs-font-weight-minimal.$description: Tabs tab link font weight (minimal appearance).

kui-tabs-line-height.$description: Tabs tab link line height (default appearance).

kui-tabs-line-height-minimal.$description: Tabs tab link line height (minimal appearance).

kui-tabs-padding.$description: Tabs tab link inner padding (default appearance).

kui-toaster-close-color-text-hover.$description: Toaster close button icon color on hover and focus.

kui-toaster-icon-color.$description: Toaster icon color (knockout matching the toaster background).

kui-toaster-icon-color-background.$description: Toaster icon container background color (info appearance as default).

kui-toaster-icon-color-background-danger.$description: Danger toaster icon container background color.

kui-toaster-icon-color-background-info.$description: Info toaster icon container background color.

kui-toaster-icon-color-background-succes.$description: Success toaster icon container background color.

kui-toaster-icon-color-background-system.$description: System toaster icon container background color.

kui-toaster-icon-color-background-warnin.$description: Warning toaster icon container background color.

kui-tree-list-border-radius.$description: Tree list item border radius (also applied to the expand/collapse toggle focus ring).

kui-tree-list-color-background-drag-indi.$description: Tree list drag indicator bar background color, shown when dragging an item to a drop location.

kui-tree-list-color-background-hover.$description: Tree list item background color on hover, focus, and focus-visible.

kui-tree-list-color-background-selected.$description: Tree list item background color when selected.

kui-tree-list-color-border-connector.$description: Tree list connecting line color (the lines linking parent and child items).

kui-tree-list-color-border-selected.$description: Tree list item border color when selected.

kui-tree-list-color-text-icon.$description: Tree list item leading icon color.

kui-tree-list-color-text-icon-selected.$description: Tree list item leading icon color when selected.

kui-tree-list-shadow-focus.$description: Tree list item focus-visible shadow (focus ring).

kui-truncate-collapse-trigger-color-back.$description: Truncate collapse trigger button background color.
Truncate collapse trigger button background color on hover, focus, and focus-within.

kui-truncate-collapse-trigger-color-text.$description: Truncate collapse trigger button text color.

kui-truncate-expand-trigger-color-text.$description: Truncate expand trigger button text color.

kui-truncate-expand-trigger-color-text-h.$description: Truncate expand trigger button text color on hover and focus.

kui-truncate-shadow-focus.$description: Truncate expand and collapse trigger button focus-visible ring shadow.
